title: timestamp coarsening: sub-minute precision MUST NOT be displayed
description:
IMPROVEMENTS.md §15.1: Clients SHOULD NOT expose sub-minute precision for readAt, lastReadAt, or deviceDeliveredAt in the UI. Display relative or hour-granularity strings. Store full-precision values internally for sorting.

This applies to every client crate (TUI, egui, iced, slint, tauri).

What:
- Add a format_receipt_timestamp(dt: &UTCDate) -> String helper in jmap-chat lib (or each client)
- Output format: 'Today', 'Yesterday', 'Mon 14:00', 'Apr 12' — never 'Apr 12 14:32:07'
- Internal sort/comparison always uses full-precision UTCDate
- Unit tests: given a UTCDate with seconds precision, assert formatted output lacks sub-minute detail
